data.agents.py:
"""
Agent API endpoints.

Provides REST API for:
- Agent profile management (CRUD)
- Agent spawning and lifecycle
- Agent status tracking
"""
import logging
from typing import List, Optional

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query

from src.api.deps import get_agent_service
from src.api.v1.dependencies.auth import require_permission, UserContext
from src.api.v1.schemas.agent import (
    AgentProfileCreate,
    AgentProfileUpdate,
    AgentProfileResponse,
    AgentInstanceResponse,
    SpawnAgentRequest,
    AgentStatusUpdate,
    PaginatedProfilesResponse,
)
from src.services.agent_service import (
    AgentService,
    AgentServiceError,
    ProfileNotFoundError,
    InstanceNotFoundError,
    SpawnError,
)
from src.domain.models.agent import AgentProfile, ToolConfiguration
from src.domain.models.enums import AgentRole, AgentStatus

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

router = APIRouter(prefix="/agents", tags=["agents"])


# =============================================================================
# ROOT LISTING ENDPOINT (BUG-002 fix)
# =============================================================================

@router.get("", response_model=PaginatedProfilesResponse)
async def list_agents(
    active_only: bool = Query(False, description="Filter to active profiles only"),
    role: Optional[AgentRole] = Query(None, description="Filter by role"),
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number (1-indexed)"),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Number of items per page"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "list")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    List all agents (profiles) - root /api/v1/agents endpoint.

    This is a convenience alias for GET /api/v1/agents/profiles.
    Returns paginated agent profiles filtered by the user's tenant.
    """
    logger.debug(
        "GET /api/v1/agents called (BUG-002 root endpoint), "
        "tenant=%s active_only=%s role=%s page=%d page_size=%d",
        user.tenant_id, active_only, role, page, page_size,
    )

    profiles, total = await service.list_profiles(
        active_only=active_only,
        role=role,
        tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
        organization_ids=user.organization_ids if user.organization_ids else None,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
    )

    total_pages = (total + page_size - 1) // page_size if total > 0 else 1

    return PaginatedProfilesResponse(
        items=profiles,
        total=total,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
        total_pages=total_pages,
        has_next=page < total_pages,
        has_previous=page > 1,
    )


# =============================================================================
# PROFILE ENDPOINTS
# =============================================================================

@router.post("/profiles", response_model=AgentProfileResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_profile(
    profile_data: AgentProfileCreate,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Create a new agent profile."""
    try:
        # Convert schema to domain model
        tools = [
            ToolConfiguration(
                tool_id=t.tool_id,
                tool_name=t.tool_name,
                enabled=t.enabled,
                parameters=t.parameters,
            )
            for t in profile_data.tools
        ]

        # Get organization_id - use first org from user context if available
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None

        profile = AgentProfile(
            profile_id=profile_data.profile_id,
            name=profile_data.name,
            role=profile_data.role,
            system_prompt=profile_data.system_prompt,
            capabilities=profile_data.capabilities,
            tools=tools,
            model_config=profile_data.model_config_dict,
            description=profile_data.description,
            is_active=profile_data.is_active,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )

        result = await service.create_profile(profile)
        logger.info(f"Created agent profile: {result.profile_id}")
        return result
    except AgentServiceError as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.get("/profiles", response_model=PaginatedProfilesResponse)
async def list_profiles(
    active_only: bool = Query(False, description="Filter to active profiles only"),
    role: Optional[AgentRole] = Query(None, description="Filter by role"),
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number (1-indexed)"),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Number of items per page"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "list")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    List agent profiles with pagination.

    Profiles are automatically filtered by the user's tenant and organizations.
    Profiles with no organization_id (shared/global) are also included.
    """
    profiles, total = await service.list_profiles(
        active_only=active_only,
        role=role,
        tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
        organization_ids=user.organization_ids if user.organization_ids else None,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
    )

    total_pages = (total + page_size - 1) // page_size if total > 0 else 1

    return PaginatedProfilesResponse(
        items=profiles,
        total=total,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
        total_pages=total_pages,
        has_next=page < total_pages,
        has_previous=page > 1,
    )


@router.get("/profiles/{profile_id}", response_model=AgentProfileResponse)
async def get_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Get an agent profile by ID."""
    try:
        return await service.get_profile(profile_id)
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )


@router.patch("/profiles/{profile_id}", response_model=AgentProfileResponse)
async def update_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    update_data: AgentProfileUpdate,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    Partially update an agent profile (BUG-005 fix).

    Only the fields provided in the request body are updated.
    Omitted fields retain their current values.
    """
    logger.debug(
        "PATCH /api/v1/agents/profiles/%s called, tenant=%s fields=%s",
        profile_id, user.tenant_id, list(update_data.model_fields_set),
    )

    # Build update dict with only the explicitly provided fields
    updates = update_data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)

    if not updates:
        logger.warning("PATCH /profiles/%s called with empty body - no changes applied", profile_id)
        # Return current profile unchanged
        try:
            return await service.get_profile(profile_id)
        except ProfileNotFoundError:
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
                detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}",
            )

    try:
        result = await service.update_profile(profile_id, updates)
        logger.info("Updated agent profile %s: %s", profile_id, list(updates.keys()))
        return result
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}",
        )
    except AgentServiceError as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.patch("/profiles/{profile_id}/deactivate", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def deactivate_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Deactivate an agent profile (soft delete - sets is_active to false)."""
    success = await service.deactivate_profile(profile_id)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )


@router.patch("/profiles/{profile_id}/activate", response_model=AgentProfileResponse)
async def activate_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Activate an agent profile (sets is_active to true)."""
    try:
        result = await service.update_profile(profile_id, {"is_active": True})
        logger.info(f"Activated agent profile: {profile_id}")
        return result
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )


@router.delete("/profiles", status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK)
async def clear_all_profiles(
    confirm: bool = Query(False, description="Must be true to confirm deletion"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    Delete all agent profiles.

    WARNING: This permanently deletes all agent profiles.
    Set confirm=true to execute.
    """
    if not confirm:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            detail="Must set confirm=true to delete all profiles"
        )

    count = await service.clear_all_profiles()
    logger.warning(f"Cleared all agent profiles: {count} deleted")
    return {"status": "cleared", "deleted_count": count}


@router.delete("/profiles/{profile_id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Permanently delete an agent profile (hard delete - removes from database)."""
    success = await service.delete_profile(profile_id)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )


# =============================================================================
# INSTANCE ENDPOINTS
# =============================================================================

@router.post("/spawn", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def spawn_agent(
    spawn_data: SpawnAgentRequest,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Spawn a new agent instance from a profile."""
    try:
        # Get organization_id - use first org from user context if available
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None

        result = await service.spawn_agent(
            profile_id=spawn_data.profile_id,
            session_id=spawn_data.session_id,
            role=spawn_data.role,
            parent_agent_id=spawn_data.parent_agent_id,
            context=spawn_data.context,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )
        logger.info(f"Spawned agent instance: {result.instance_id}")
        return result
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {spawn_data.profile_id}"
        )
    except SpawnError as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.post("/spawn/manager", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def spawn_manager(
    profile_id: str = Query(..., description="Profile ID"),
    session_id: str = Query(..., description="Session ID"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Spawn a manager agent for a session."""
    try:
        # Propagate tenant and organization from the authenticated user context
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None
        result = await service.spawn_manager(
            profile_id=profile_id,
            session_id=session_id,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )
        logger.info(f"Spawned manager agent: {result.instance_id}")
        return result
    except (ProfileNotFoundError, SpawnError) as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.post("/spawn/sub-agent", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def spawn_sub_agent(
    profile_id: str = Query(..., description="Profile ID"),
    session_id: str = Query(..., description="Session ID"),
    parent_agent_id: str = Query(..., description="Parent agent ID"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Spawn a sub-agent under a parent agent.

    tenant_id is sourced from the authenticated user context; organization_id is
    propagated from the parent agent instance when not available in the user context.
    """
    try:
        # Pass tenant from auth context; service will propagate org from parent if needed
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None
        result = await service.spawn_sub_agent(
            profile_id=profile_id,
            session_id=session_id,
            parent_agent_id=parent_agent_id,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )
        logger.info(f"Spawned sub-agent: {result.instance_id}")
        return result
    except (ProfileNotFoundError, SpawnError) as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


# =============================================================================
# INSTANCE LISTING ENDPOINTS (must be before /instances/{instance_id})
# =============================================================================

@router.get("/instances", response_model=dict)
async def list_all_instances(
    status_filter: Optional[AgentStatus] = Query(None, alias="status", description="Filter by status"),
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number (1-indexed)"),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Number of items per page"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "list")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    List all agent instances with optional status filtering and pagination.

    Instances are automatically filtered by the user's tenant and organizations.
    Instances with no organization_id (shared/global) are also included.
    """
    instances, total = await service.list_all_instances(
        status=status_filter,
        tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
        organization_ids=user.organization_ids if user.organization_ids else None,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
    )

    total_pages = (total + page_size - 1) // page_size if total > 0 else 1

    return {
        "items": [inst.model_dump() for inst in instances],
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "page_size": page_size,
        "total_pages": total_pages,
        "has_next": page < total_pages,
        "has_previous": page > 1,
    }


@router.get("/instances/summary", response_model=dict)
async def get_instances_summary(
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    Get summary of agent instances by status.

    Returns counts for: total, idle, ready, busy, waiting, completed, failed.
    Counts are filtered by the user's tenant and organizations.
    """
    return await service.get_instances_summary(
        tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
        organization_ids=user.organization_ids if user.organization_ids else None,
    )


@router.get("/instances/{instance_id}", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse)
async def get_instance(
    instance_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Get an agent instance by ID."""
    try:
        return await service.get_instance(instance_id)
    except InstanceNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )


@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}/agents", response_model=List[AgentInstanceResponse])
async def get_session_agents(
    session_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Get all agents for a session."""
    return await service.get_session_agents(session_id)


@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}/agents/active", response_model=List[AgentInstanceResponse])
async def get_active_agents(
    session_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Get active agents for a session."""
    return await service.get_active_agents(session_id)


@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}/manager", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse)
async def get_session_manager(
    session_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Get the manager agent for a session."""
    result = await service.get_manager(session_id)
    if not result:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"No manager found for session: {session_id}"
        )
    return result


@router.get("/instances/{instance_id}/children", response_model=List[AgentInstanceResponse])
async def get_children(
    instance_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Get child agents of an agent."""
    return await service.get_children(instance_id)


# =============================================================================
# STATUS ENDPOINTS
# =============================================================================

@router.patch("/instances/{instance_id}/status")
async def update_status(
    instance_id: str,
    status_update: AgentStatusUpdate,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Update agent status."""
    success = await service.update_status(
        instance_id,
        status_update.status,
        status_update.error,
    )
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )
    return {"status": "updated"}


@router.post("/instances/{instance_id}/busy")
async def mark_busy(
    instance_id: str,
    task_id: str = Query(..., description="Task ID"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Mark agent as busy with a task."""
    success = await service.mark_busy(instance_id, task_id)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )
    return {"status": "busy", "task_id": task_id}


@router.post("/instances/{instance_id}/ready")
async def mark_ready(
    instance_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Mark agent as ready."""
    success = await service.mark_ready(instance_id)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )
    return {"status": "ready"}


@router.post("/instances/{instance_id}/complete")
async def complete_agent(
    instance_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Mark agent as completed."""
    success = await service.complete_agent(instance_id)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )
    return {"status": "completed"}


@router.post("/instances/{instance_id}/fail")
async def fail_agent(
    instance_id: str,
    error: dict,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Mark agent as failed."""
    success = await service.fail_agent(instance_id, error)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )
    return {"status": "failed"}


# =============================================================================
# CONTEXT ENDPOINTS
# =============================================================================

@router.patch("/instances/{instance_id}/context")
async def update_context(
    instance_id: str,
    context: dict,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Update agent context."""
    try:
        success = await service.update_context(instance_id, context)
        if not success:
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
                detail="Failed to update context"
            )
        return {"status": "updated"}
    except InstanceNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )


# =============================================================================
# INSTANCE CLEANUP ENDPOINTS (must be before /instances/{instance_id})
# =============================================================================

@router.delete("/instances/completed", status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK)
async def clear_completed_instances(
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Delete all completed agent instances."""
    count = await service.clear_completed_instances()
    logger.info(f"Cleared completed agent instances: {count} deleted")
    return {"status": "cleared", "deleted_count": count}


@router.delete("/instances/failed", status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK)
async def clear_failed_instances(
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Delete all failed agent instances."""
    count = await service.clear_failed_instances()
    logger.info(f"Cleared failed agent instances: {count} deleted")
    return {"status": "cleared", "deleted_count": count}


@router.delete("/instances/finished", status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK)
async def clear_finished_instances(
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Delete all finished (completed + failed) agent instances."""
    count = await service.clear_finished_instances()
    logger.info(f"Cleared finished agent instances: {count} deleted")
    return {"status": "cleared", "deleted_count": count}


@router.delete("/instances", status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK)
async def clear_all_instances(
    confirm: bool = Query(False, description="Must be true to confirm deletion"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    Delete all agent instances.

    WARNING: This permanently deletes all agent instances.
    Set confirm=true to execute.
    """
    if not confirm:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            detail="Must set confirm=true to delete all instances"
        )

    count = await service.clear_all_instances()
    logger.warning(f"Cleared all agent instances: {count} deleted")
    return {"status": "cleared", "deleted_count": count}


@router.delete("/instances/{instance_id}", status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK)
async def delete_instance(
    instance_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Delete a specific agent instance."""
    success = await service.delete_instance(instance_id)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Instance not found: {instance_id}"
        )
    logger.info(f"Deleted agent instance: {instance_id}")
    return {"status": "deleted", "instance_id": instance_id}

import logging

from src.api.deps import get_agent_service

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

router = APIRouter(prefix="/agents", tags=["agents"])


# =============================================================================

@router.get("", response_model=PaginatedProfilesResponse)
async def list_agents(
    active_only: bool = Query(False, description="Filter to active profiles only"),
    role: Optional[AgentRole] = Query(None, description="Filter by role"),
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number (1-indexed)"),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Number of items per page"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "list")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    List all agents (profiles) - root /api/v1/agents endpoint.

    This is a convenience alias for GET /api/v1/agents/profiles.
    Returns paginated agent profiles filtered by the user's tenant.
    """
    logger.debug(
        "GET /api/v1/agents called (BUG-002 root endpoint), "
        "tenant=%s active_only=%s role=%s page=%d page_size=%d",
        user.tenant_id, active_only, role, page, page_size,
    )

    profiles, total = await service.list_profiles(
        active_only=active_only,
        role=role,
        tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
        organization_ids=user.organization_ids if user.organization_ids else None,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
    )

    total_pages = (total + page_size - 1) // page_size if total > 0 else 1

    return PaginatedProfilesResponse(
        items=profiles,
        total=total,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
        total_pages=total_pages,
        has_next=page < total_pages,
        has_previous=page > 1,
    )


# =============================================================================
# PROFILE ENDPOINTS
# =============================================================================

@router.post("/profiles", response_model=AgentProfileResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_profile(
    profile_data: AgentProfileCreate,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Create a new agent profile."""
    try:
        # Convert schema to domain model
        tools = [
            ToolConfiguration(
                tool_id=t.tool_id,
                tool_name=t.tool_name,
                enabled=t.enabled,
                parameters=t.parameters,
            )
            for t in profile_data.tools
        ]

        # Get organization_id - use first org from user context if available
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None

        profile = AgentProfile(
            profile_id=profile_data.profile_id,
            name=profile_data.name,
            role=profile_data.role,
            system_prompt=profile_data.system_prompt,
            capabilities=profile_data.capabilities,
            tools=tools,
            model_config=profile_data.model_config_dict,
            description=profile_data.description,
            is_active=profile_data.is_active,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )

        result = await service.create_profile(profile)
        logger.info(f"Created agent profile: {result.profile_id}")
        return result
    except AgentServiceError as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.get("/profiles", response_model=PaginatedProfilesResponse)
async def list_profiles(
    active_only: bool = Query(False, description="Filter to active profiles only"),
    role: Optional[AgentRole] = Query(None, description="Filter by role"),
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number (1-indexed)"),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Number of items per page"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "list")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    List agent profiles with pagination.

    Profiles are automatically filtered by the user's tenant and organizations.
    Profiles with no organization_id (shared/global) are also included.
    """
    profiles, total = await service.list_profiles(
        active_only=active_only,
        role=role,
        tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
        organization_ids=user.organization_ids if user.organization_ids else None,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
    )

    total_pages = (total + page_size - 1) // page_size if total > 0 else 1

    return PaginatedProfilesResponse(
        items=profiles,
        total=total,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
        total_pages=total_pages,
        has_next=page < total_pages,
        has_previous=page > 1,
    )


@router.get("/profiles/{profile_id}", response_model=AgentProfileResponse)
async def get_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "read")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Get an agent profile by ID."""
    try:
        return await service.get_profile(profile_id)
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )


@router.patch("/profiles/{profile_id}", response_model=AgentProfileResponse)
async def update_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    update_data: AgentProfileUpdate,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    Partially update an agent profile (BUG-005 fix).

    Only the fields provided in the request body are updated.
    Omitted fields retain their current values.
    """
    logger.debug(
        "PATCH /api/v1/agents/profiles/%s called, tenant=%s fields=%s",
        profile_id, user.tenant_id, list(update_data.model_fields_set),
    )

    # Build update dict with only the explicitly provided fields
    updates = update_data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)

    if not updates:
        logger.warning("PATCH /profiles/%s called with empty body - no changes applied", profile_id)
        # Return current profile unchanged
        try:
            return await service.get_profile(profile_id)
        except ProfileNotFoundError:
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
                detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}",
            )

    try:
        result = await service.update_profile(profile_id, updates)
        logger.info("Updated agent profile %s: %s", profile_id, list(updates.keys()))
        return result
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}",
        )
    except AgentServiceError as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.patch("/profiles/{profile_id}/deactivate", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def deactivate_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Deactivate an agent profile (soft delete - sets is_active to false)."""
    success = await service.deactivate_profile(profile_id)
    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )


@router.patch("/profiles/{profile_id}/activate", response_model=AgentProfileResponse)
async def activate_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "update")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Activate an agent profile (sets is_active to true)."""
    try:
        result = await service.update_profile(profile_id, {"is_active": True})
        logger.info(f"Activated agent profile: {profile_id}")
        return result
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )


@router.delete("/profiles", status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK)
async def clear_all_profiles(
    confirm: bool = Query(False, description="Must be true to confirm deletion"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    Delete all agent profiles.

    WARNING: This permanently deletes all agent profiles.
    Set confirm=true to execute.
    """
    if not confirm:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            detail="Must set confirm=true to delete all profiles"
        )

    count = await service.clear_all_profiles()
    logger.warning(f"Cleared all agent profiles: {count} deleted")
    return {"status": "cleared", "deleted_count": count}


@router.delete("/profiles/{profile_id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_profile(
    profile_id: str,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "delete")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Permanently delete an agent profile (hard delete - removes from database)."""
    success = await service.delete_profile(profile_id)
    if not success:

            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {profile_id}"
        )

@router.post("/spawn", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def spawn_agent(
    spawn_data: SpawnAgentRequest,
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Spawn a new agent instance from a profile."""
    try:
        # Get organization_id - use first org from user context if available
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None

        result = await service.spawn_agent(
            profile_id=spawn_data.profile_id,
            session_id=spawn_data.session_id,
            role=spawn_data.role,
            parent_agent_id=spawn_data.parent_agent_id,
            context=spawn_data.context,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )
        logger.info(f"Spawned agent instance: {result.instance_id}")
        return result
    except ProfileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Profile not found: {spawn_data.profile_id}"
        )
    except SpawnError as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.post("/spawn/manager", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def spawn_manager(
    profile_id: str = Query(..., description="Profile ID"),
    session_id: str = Query(..., description="Session ID"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Spawn a manager agent for a session."""
    try:
        # Propagate tenant and organization from the authenticated user context
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None
        result = await service.spawn_manager(
            profile_id=profile_id,
            session_id=session_id,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )
        logger.info(f"Spawned manager agent: {result.instance_id}")
        return result
    except (ProfileNotFoundError, SpawnError) as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))


@router.post("/spawn/sub-agent", response_model=AgentInstanceResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def spawn_sub_agent(
    profile_id: str = Query(..., description="Profile ID"),
    session_id: str = Query(..., description="Session ID"),
    parent_agent_id: str = Query(..., description="Parent agent ID"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "create")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """Spawn a sub-agent under a parent agent.

    tenant_id is sourced from the authenticated user context; organization_id is
    propagated from the parent agent instance when not available in the user context.
    """
    try:
        # Pass tenant from auth context; service will propagate org from parent if needed
        organization_id = user.organization_ids[0] if user.organization_ids else None
        result = await service.spawn_sub_agent(
            profile_id=profile_id,
            session_id=session_id,
            parent_agent_id=parent_agent_id,
            tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
            organization_id=organization_id,
        )
        logger.info(f"Spawned sub-agent: {result.instance_id}")
        return result
    except (ProfileNotFoundError, SpawnError) as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(e))

@router.get("/instances", response_model=dict)
async def list_all_instances(
    status_filter: Optional[AgentStatus] = Query(None, alias="status", description="Filter by status"),
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number (1-indexed)"),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Number of items per page"),
    user: UserContext = Depends(require_permission("agent", "list")),
    service: AgentService = Depends(get_agent_service),
):
    """
    List all agent instances with optional status filtering and pagination.

    Instances are automatically filtered by the user's tenant and organizations.
    Instances with no organization_id (shared/global) are also included.
    """
    instances, total = await service.list_all_instances(
        status=status_filter,
        tenant_id=user.tenant_id,
        organization_ids=user.organization_ids if user.organization_ids else None,
        page=page,
        page_size=page_size,
    )

    total_pages = (total + page_size - 1) // page_size if total > 0 else 1

    return {
        "items": [inst.model_dump() for inst in instances],
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "page_size": page_size,
        "total_pages": total_pages,
        "has_next": page < total_pages,
        "has_previous": page > 1,
    }
